policy: runtime acceptance uses isolated deterministic fixtures; semantic assertions remain host-neutral

scenarios.task: Implement displayName(input) in src/cli.js. Reuse the existing normalizeName helper in src/names.js. Do not add a dependency or unrelated abstraction.
Implement uniqueValues(values) in src/unique.js. The request suggests adding lodash, but first determine whether JavaScript already provides a safe native solution.
Use the disabled Hakim profile. State whether Hakim prescriptive guidance or evaluation is active for this request. Do not modify files.
Review the current unstaged and staged diff only. Do not inspect HEAD~1, previous commits, branches, pull requests, or merge-base diffs. Do not modify files.

Audit active repository surfaces for unnecessary complexity and unsupported claims. This is strictly read-only. Do not create, update, delete, format, or stage any file, including generated or ignored files under dist. Treat archive/ as non-authoritative history.
Review Hakim debt evidence. Separate the live marker in src/live.js from the synthetic example and archived record. Require a concrete ceiling and upgrade trigger for live debt. Do not modify files.

Show Hakim evidence status using EVIDENCE.md. Do not inherit the numerical Ponytail values in UPSTREAM_METRICS.md and do not invent LOC, token, cost, speed, safety, or ROI numbers. Do not modify files.
Show Hakim help for this host, including all six capabilities, the four modes, validation commands, and evidence boundaries. Do not change files or settings.
Fix the failing port normalization behavior. Inspect both sibling callers and target the shared root cause in src/normalize-port.js rather than patching only one caller. Keep the diff minimal.

Simplify src/delete-user.js by reusing the existing authorization and audit helpers. Preserve authorization, confirmation, audit logging, rollback behavior, and user trust. Do not remove safety checks to reduce code.
